_meta.name: Beghou Arc — Typography Tokens
_meta.note: Stopgap token file derived from the non-Kendo design system spec. Use until the Kendo ThemeBuilder export is ready, then replace with the ThemeBuilder variables.json. Pair with beghou-color-tokens.json — text colors are referenced there (brand.navy for body text on light surfaces).

weights._inAppUsage: Arc apps use Regular (400) for body and Bold (700) for headings 4–6 and emphasis. Medium (500) appears in component-specific styles. Light (300) is marketing-only (Display sizes). SemiBold (600) is available but rarely used in Arc apps.

letterSpacing._note: Letter-spacing is always 0. Arc does not use tracked letter-spacing anywhere.

scale._note: Full type scale from the spec. Sizes are absolute pixel values. Line heights are kept in the spec's original units (percentages for the scale, absolute pixels for component-specific styles).

componentStyles._note: Specific text styles used inside named components. Reference these by name when building the matching component.

layoutHelper.usedIn: Small category labels ('STATUS', 'LAST UPDATED'). Always Regular weight, never Bold.

arcAppDefaults._note: When building an Arc app screen, default to these mappings unless the design says otherwise.

rules.typeface: Inter only. Never substitute another sans-serif.
rules.letterSpacing: Always 0. No tracking anywhere in Arc.
rules.bodyColor: Body text on light surfaces is always Beghou Navy (#020434 — see beghou-color-tokens.json brand.navy), never pure black, never grey.
rules.allCaps: All-caps labels use the layoutHelper style only (10px Regular). Never use Bold for all-caps.
rules.headingWeight: Heading 4–6 are Bold (700). Heading 1–3 are Regular (400) — they're inherited from marketing typography and rarely appropriate in-app.
rules.responsiveScale: Arc does not currently define responsive type scales — the same sizes apply across viewport widths. Card / page chrome adapts via spacing and layout, not type size.
